name: MSI PRO B550-VC ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR4-4400(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Gigabit LAN (B550PROVC)
shortName: MSI PRO B550-VC ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x
description: Mid-range AMD AM4 ATX motherboard with B550 chipset and PCIe 4.0 support for budget-friendly Ryzen systems.
